creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Mon May 14 09:16:09 UTC 2018
New revision: 469869
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/469869

Log:
  New port: mail/p5-Sisimai

  Sisimai is the system formerly known as bounceHammer 4, is a Perl
  module for analyzing bounce mails and generate structured data in
  a JSON format (YAML is also available if "YAML" module is installed
  on your system) from parsed bounce messages. Sisimai is a coined
  word: Sisi (the number 4 is pronounced "Si" in Japanese) and MAI
  (acronym of "Mail Analyzing Interface").

  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Sisimai/

  PR:	228201

Changes:
  head/mail/Makefile
  head/mail/p5-Sisimai/
  head/mail/p5-Sisimai/Makefile
  head/mail/p5-Sisimai/distinfo
  head/mail/p5-Sisimai/pkg-descr
  head/mail/p5-Sisimai/pkg-plist
